# Getting help with Sutra

Please use the right channel; it gets you an answer faster and keeps the issue tracker actionable.

| You need | Go to |
|---|---|
| To understand what Sutra is and how the pieces fit | [`docs/OVERVIEW.md`](../docs/OVERVIEW.md) |
| To ask a question or discuss an idea | [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/moolamai/sutra/discussions) |
| To report a bug with a reproduction | [Bug report issue](https://github.com/moolamai/sutra/issues/new/choose) |
| To propose a protocol or cognitive contract change | The RFC issue template (see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) section 9) |
| To report a security vulnerability | Private advisory or security@moolam.org; see [`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md). Never a public issue. |
| To report a conduct concern | conduct@moolam.org; see [`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) |
| To start contributing | [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md), then the `good first issue` label |

Before asking, it helps to search Discussions and closed issues; many setup questions (pnpm versions, Python extras, Docker stack) have been answered already. When you do ask, include your OS, Node/pnpm/Python versions, and the exact command and output; "it does not work" is the slowest possible starting point.
